nodes.label: Agent Constitution
nodes.rationale: Defines rules for humans and coding agents developing PineForge collaboratively, establishing strict architectural, database, testing, and git disciplines.

nodes.label: PineForge Vision
nodes.rationale: AI-powered Pine Script engineering platform for generating, validating, refining, and managing TradingView Pine Script strategies.

nodes.label: Graphify RAG Layer
nodes.rationale: Use Graphify as the v1 RAG layer to supply prompt-specific Pine Script v6 context to the LLM without exceeding context limits with the full docs (~123k tokens).

nodes.label: Rails 8 API mode
nodes.rationale: Enables ActionController::Live for SSE streaming and supports Solid Queue integrated within the Puma process for simplified background jobs.
